search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk CG97 frequency urgency nocturia LUTS assessment
site:nice.org.uk NG123 urgency overactive bladder diary urine test
candidate_sources_rejected: male-only or female-only evidence treated as universal
rejection_reasons: Patient pages were not exact clinician evidence.
population_applicability: Partial: NICE CG97 applies to adult men and NG123 to adult women; the workflow is sex-unspecified and includes polyuria beyond storage LUTS.
setting_applicability: Exact for selected assessment, urine testing, residual, diary, and clinician-discussed fluid fields; UAE pathways require adaptation.
UAE_applicability: DHA red-flag support is UAE-direct; the main storage-symptom evidence is international supporting guidance.
recency_verification: Current NICE CG97/NG123 and DHA Issue 2 sections were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: The reviewed NICE and DHA sources remain current.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports male frequency, urgency, nocturia, urinary history, examination, and urinalysis.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports symptom and medicine history, abdominal and genital examination, digital rectal examination, frequency-volume context, urinalysis, qualified PSA discussion, qualified creatinine, conservative-advice documentation, and referral criteria.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports retention and bladder-distension context in adult men.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports acute or chronic urinary-retention context, palpable or percussable bladder, residual volume, creatinine, qualified imaging, and clinician-led follow-up or referral; catheter and medicine instructions are not mapped.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports urgency and incontinence context in adult women.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports urgency-incontinence or overactive-bladder symptom context, relevant contributing factors, and clinician-performed pelvic-floor assessment in adult women.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports urine testing, residual measurement, and bladder diary in adult women.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports urine dipstick, qualified culture, post-void residual, and bladder-diary documentation in adult women.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports fluid discussion and bladder training only when clinician-discussed.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting caffeine or fluid discussion and bladder training only when discussed or arranged by the clinician for qualified adult women.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports UAE warning prompts for fever, flank pain, haematuria, pregnancy, recurrence, and systemic illness.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports fever with flank pain or tenderness, vomiting, visible haematuria, pregnancy, diabetes, immunosuppression, and recurrence as prompts only, without automatic urgency or referral output.

unresolved_source_gaps: Sex-unspecified use, polyuria, glucose testing, abdominal examination defaults, fixed follow-up timing, treatment, and referral remain incompletely supported.
